app.title: People directory
app.tagline: Material foundations for a clear CRUD workspace

empty.title: Nothing to show
empty.message: Content will appear here as soon as data is available.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: Please try again or come back later.

loading.title: Loading
loading.message: Please wait while the content is prepared.

accessDenied.title: You do not have permission to open this page.
accessDenied.message: Your session is active, but the assigned role cannot use this action.
accessDenied.navigationLabel: Navigation from the access denied page

notFound.title: This address does not match any page.
notFound.message: The link may be outdated or the address contains a mistake.
notFound.navigationLabel: Navigation from the not found page

list.title: Browse and manage people in one place.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone

list.loadErrorTitle: The directory could not be loaded
list.loadErrorMessage: Try again to retrieve the people list with the current filters.
list.emptySearchMessage: Try another search term or clear the current search.
list.emptyDirectoryTitle: No people in the directory yet
list.emptyDirectoryMessage: Create the first person to start filling the directory.
list.tableCaption: Search results from the people directory.

detail.notFoundMessage: This record no longer exists or the identifier does not match any person.
detail.loadErrorTitle: The person could not be loaded

form.birthDateFuture: The date cannot be in the future.
form.birthDateInvalid: The entered date is not valid.

profile.subtitle: Information from the active security session.

directory.label: View the directory
